positive: Minimalist circular emblem design of a stylized, geometrically perfect crescent moon cradling three abstract, delicate star clusters and framed by interlocking laurel leaves. The style is ultra-clean, modern linework vector illustration, black ink on a muted sage green background. Use extreme negative space, high contrast black silhouette details, and crisp lines. The composition must be centered and scalable for apparel print. Inspired by Art Nouveau geometry, graphic design principles, clean symmetry, high detail, 8k resolution, perfect print surface.
